text:
Once upon a time... there was a curious young boy named Tommy. Tommy loved all kinds of stories. One evening, Tommy discovered that stories about brave mice sounded especially interesting.

After dinner, Tommy climbed into the living room. The first mouse wasn't exactly brave. They froze. You wouldn't.

With a deep breath, Tommy spoke softly.

"You're too scary. How about just a tiny little mouse?"
